Title: Murder
Description: Whoever commits murder shall be punished with death or imprisonment for life.

Title: Culpable Homicide
Description: Culpable homicide not amounting to murder.

Title: Attempt to Murder
Description: Act done with intention or knowledge causing attempt to murder.

Title: Voluntarily Causing Hurt
Description: Whoever voluntarily causes hurt shall be punished.

Title: Causing Hurt by Dangerous Weapons
Description: Causing hurt using dangerous weapons or means.

Title: Grievous Hurt
Description: Voluntarily causing grievous hurt.

Title: Grievous Hurt by Dangerous Weapons
Description: Causing grievous hurt using dangerous weapons.

Title: Wrongful Restraint
Description: Wrongfully restraining any person.

Title: Wrongful Confinement
Description: Wrongfully confining any person.

Title: Outraging Modesty of Woman
Description: Assault or criminal force to woman with intent to outrage modesty.

Title: Kidnapping
Description: Whoever kidnaps any person from lawful guardianship.

Title: Kidnapping Woman for Marriage
Description: Kidnapping or abducting woman to compel marriage.

Title: Rape
Description: Punishment for rape.

Title: Theft
Description: Whoever intends to take dishonestly any movable property.

Title: Punishment for Theft
Description: Punishment for committing theft.

Title: Robbery
Description: Theft or extortion involving violence or fear.

Title: Punishment for Robbery
Description: Punishment for committing robbery.

Title: Dacoity
Description: Five or more persons committing robbery.

Title: Robbery with Attempt to Cause Death
Description: Robbery or dacoity with attempt to cause death or grievous hurt.

Title: Criminal Breach of Trust
Description: Whoever commits criminal breach of trust shall be punished.

Title: Criminal Breach of Trust by Public Servant
Description: Criminal breach of trust committed by public servant or banker.

Title: Cheating
Description: Whoever cheats another person dishonestly.

Title: Cheating and Dishonestly Inducing Delivery of Property
Description: Cheating and inducing delivery of property dishonestly.

Title: Forgery
Description: Making false documents with intent to cause damage.

Title: Punishment for Forgery
Description: Punishment for committing forgery.

Title: Forgery for Purpose of Cheating
Description: Forgery committed for purpose of cheating.

Title: Using Forged Document as Genuine
Description: Using forged document dishonestly as genuine.

Title: Defamation
Description: Making or publishing imputations harming reputation.

Title: Punishment for Defamation
Description: Punishment for defamation.

Title: Criminal Intimidation
Description: Threatening another person with injury to reputation or property.

Title: Punishment for Criminal Intimidation
Description: Punishment for criminal intimidation.

Title: Insulting Modesty of Woman
Description: Word or gesture intended to insult modesty of woman.

Title: Criminal Conspiracy
Description: Agreement between persons to commit illegal act.

Title: Unlawful Assembly
Description: Assembly of five or more persons with common illegal object.

Title: Punishment for Unlawful Assembly
Description: Punishment for being member of unlawful assembly.

Title: Rioting
Description: Use of force or violence by unlawful assembly.

Title: Rioting with Deadly Weapon
Description: Rioting while armed with deadly weapon.

Title: Every Member Guilty of Offence
Description: Every member of unlawful assembly guilty of offence committed.

Title: Promoting Enmity
Description: Promoting enmity between different groups.

Title: False Information
Description: Giving false information to public servant.

Title: Obstructing Public Servant
Description: Obstructing public servant in discharge of duties.

Title: Disobedience to Order
Description: Disobedience to order duly promulgated by public servant.

Title: Causing Disappearance of Evidence
Description: Causing disappearance of evidence of offence.

Title: False Charge
Description: Instituting false criminal proceedings.

Title: Rash Driving
Description: Rash or negligent driving endangering human life.

Title: Causing Death by Negligence
Description: Causing death by negligent act.

Title: Mischief Causing Damage
Description: Mischief causing damage to property.

Title: Mischief by Fire
Description: Mischief by fire causing damage.

Title: House Trespass after Preparation
Description: House trespass after preparation for hurt or assault.

Title: Lurking House Trespass by Night
Description: House trespass by night.

Title: Acts Done by Several Persons
Description: Criminal act done by several persons in furtherance of common intention.

Title: Attempting to Commit Offences
Description: Attempt to commit offences punishable with imprisonment.
